ham.subject: Quarterly Infrastructure Budget Review Meeting – 25th March 2026
ham.body:
Dear Team,

Please be reminded that the Quarterly Infrastructure Budget Review will take place on Wednesday, 25 March 2026 at 10:00 AM in Conference Room B.

Agenda items include:
- Budget allocations for cloud services
- Cost‑saving initiatives for data centers
- Review of vendor contracts

Kind regards,
Finance Department

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Your Government Tax Account Overdue
spam.body:
Dear Valued Citizen,

Your tax account has been flagged for overdue payments. Immediate action is required to avoid penalties and account suspension.

Please verify your identity and update your payment information by clicking the link below:

<URL>

Thank you,
Revenue Department
